'''鈭歵h-p-p-k''' ('''kathappekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chackle|chackle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-p-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chackle|chackle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-p-p-k
|-
! Lemma
| kathappekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
